description_long: This is a large, modern SUV with a robust and angular body, featuring a two-tone color scheme with a lighter upper section and a darker lower section. The front grille is wide and prominent, with a recognizable gold Chevrolet bowtie emblem at the center, flanked by rectangular headlights. The side profile reveals four passenger doors, tinted windows, and pronounced wheel arches housing alloy wheels with a five-spoke design. The rear of the vehicle includes a large tailgate, subtle taillights, and another Chevrolet emblem, indicating its brand. Roof rails are visible on top, suggesting utility for carrying extra cargo. The overall design is utilitarian yet stylish, suitable for urban and suburban environments.
description: A large, two-tone Chevrolet SUV with four doors, alloy wheels, and roof rails, featuring a bold front grille and spacious body. The vehicle is designed for both utility and comfort in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille, Chevrolet emblem, rectangular headlights, and a slightly raised hood.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the SUV, four doors, tinted windows, and five-spoke alloy wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the large tailgate, subtle taillights, and rear Chevrolet emblem.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the four doors, alloy wheels, and roof rails.
attribute_wheel_design: Five-spoke alloy wheels with a simple, robust pattern and metallic finish
